extension.description: Elementum СҚСӮРҫ РҙРҫРҝРҫР»РҪРөРҪРёРө РҙР»СҸ РҝРҫРёСҒРәР° Рё РІРҫСҒРҝСҖРҫРёР·РІРөРҙРөРҪРёСҸ СӮРҫСҖСҖРөРҪСӮРҫРІ. Р”РҫРҝРҫР»РҪРөРҪРёРө РҪРө С…РҫРҙРёСӮ РҪР° Р·Р°РҝСҖРөСүРөРҪРҪСӢРө СҒР°Р№СӮСӢ СҒР°РјРҫСҒСӮРҫСҸСӮРөР»СҢРҪРҫ. РҘРҫСӮСҸ, РҙР»СҸ РҝРҫРёСҒРәР° РёСҒРҝРҫР»СҢР·СғСҺСӮСҒСҸ РҙРҫРҝРҫР»РҪРөРҪРёСҸ (РҪР°Р·СӢРІР°РөРјСӢРө РҝСҖРҫРІР°Р№РҙРөСҖР°РјРё), РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСӢРө СғСҒСӮР°РҪР°РІР»РёРІР°СҺСӮСҒСҸ РҫСӮРҙРөР»СҢРҪРҫ.[CR]РӯСӮРҫСӮ РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮ СҸРІР»СҸРөСӮСҒСҸ РҫСӮРІРөСӮРІР»РөРҪРёРөРј С…РҫСҖРҫСҲРҫ РёР·РІРөСҒРҪСӢС…, РҪРҫ РҪРө РҝРҫРҙРҙРөСҖР¶РёРІР°РөРјСӢС… Pulsar/Quasar РҫСӮ steeve Рё scakemyer.

Elementum is a torrent finding and streaming engine. It doesn't go on torrent websites for legal reasons. However, it calls specially crafted add-ons (called providers) that are installed separately.[CR]This project is a fork of the well known, but no longer maintained Pulsar/Quasar projects from steeve and scakemyer.

Elementum je pogon pretraЕҫivanja i strujanja. Ne posjeДҮuje torrent web stranice iz pravnih razloga. Ipak, koristi posebno napravljene dodatke (nazvane pruЕҫatelji usluge) koji su instalirani odvojeno.[CR]Ovaj projekt je ogranak dobro poznatih, ali viЕЎe ne odrЕҫavanih Pulsar/Quasar projekata od autora steevea i scakemyera.

Elementum es un motor de bГәsqueda y transmisiГіn torrent. No navega por sitios web torrent por razones legales. Sin embargo, llama a complementos especialmente diseГұados para ello (denominados providers o proveedores) que se instalan por separado.[CR]Este proyecto es un fork de los bien conocidos, pero ya sin soporte proyectos Pulsar/Quasar de steeve y scakemyer.[CR]

Elementum ГӨr en torrentsГ¶knings- och strГ¶mningsmotor. Det gГҘr inte till torrentwebbplatser av juridiska skГӨl. Den anropar dock speciellt utformade tillГӨgg (kallade leverantГ¶rer) som installeras separat.[CR]Detta projekt ГӨr en fГ¶rgrening av de vГӨlkГӨnda, men inte lГӨngre underhГҘllna Pulsar/Quasar-projekten av steeve och scakemyer.
extension.disclaimer: РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ РҙРҫРҝРҫР»РҪРөРҪРёСҸ РҪРө РҪРөСҒС‘СӮ РҫСӮРІРөСӮСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪРҫСҒСӮРё Р·Р° СҒРәР°СҮРёРІР°РҪРёРө РёР»Рё РҝРҫРёСҒРә РёРҪС„РҫСҖРјР°СҶРёРё Рё СҒРҫРҙРөСҖР¶РёРјРҫРіРҫ РІ СҚСӮРҫРј РҙРҫРҝРҫР»РҪРөРҪРёРё. РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ РҪРёРәР°Рә РҪРө СҒРІСҸР·Р°РҪ СҒ Kodi, РәРҫРјР°РҪРҙРҫР№ Kodi, РёР»Рё XBMC Foundation.

El autor no posee ni aloja ningГәn contenido que se encuentre a travГ©s de este complemento. El autor no estГЎ unido ni relacionado de ninguna manera con Kodi, Team Kodi, o XBMC Foundation.

Mutagen is a Python module to handle audio metadata.
extension.description: Mutagen is a Python module to handle audio metadata. It supports ASF, FLAC, M4A, Monkey's Audio, MP3, Musepack, Ogg Opus, Ogg FLAC, Ogg Speex, Ogg Theora, Ogg Vorbis, True Audio, WavPack and OptimFROG audio files. All versions of ID3v2 are supported, and all standard ID3v2.4 frames are parsed. It can read Xing headers to accurately calculate the bitrate and length of MP3s. ID3 and APEv2 tags can be edited regardless of audio format. It can also manipulate Ogg streams on an individual packet/page level.
extension.disclaimer: Code taken from http://code.google.com/p/mutagen/
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 2, June 1991

О•ПҖОҜО»П…ПғО· ПғП…ОҪОҙОӯПғОјПүОҪ ОәОҝО№ОҪПҺОҪ ОөОҫП…ПҖО·ПҒОөП„О·П„ПҺОҪ ПғОө ОјОҝПҒПҶО® ОІОҜОҪП„ОөОҝ О№ОәОұОҪПҢ ОіО№Оұ ОұОҪОұПҖОұПҒОұОіПүОіО® ПғП„Оҝ XBMC/Kodi.

О•ПҖОҜО»П…ПғО· ПғП…ОҪОҙОӯПғОјПүОҪ ОәОҝО№ОҪПҺОҪ ОөОҫП…ПҖО·ПҒОөП„О·П„ПҺОҪ ПғОө ОјОҝПҒПҶО® ОІОҜОҪП„ОөОҝ О№ОәОұОҪПҢ ОіО№Оұ ОұОҪОұПҖОұПҒОұОіПүОіО® ПғП„Оҝ XBMC/Kodi, ОұПҖО»ОҝПҖОҝОҜО·ПғО· П„О·ПӮ ОұОҪО¬ПҖП„П…ОҫО·ПӮ П„ПүОҪ ПҖПҒОҝПғОёОӯП„ПүОҪ ПҖОҝП… ПҮПҒО·ПғО№ОјОҝПҖОҝО№ОҝПҚОҪ ПҖОҝО»О»ОұПҖО»ОҝПҚПӮ ОөОҫП…ПҖО·ПҒОөП„О·П„ОӯПӮ ОіО№Оұ П…О»О№ОәПҢ ОІОҜОҪП„ОөОҝ
Prilagodi najДҚeЕЎДҮe URL-ove video izvora kako bi radili u XBMC/Kodiju, pojednostavnjuje razvoj prikljuДҚaka za video dodatke koji zahtjevaju viЕЎestruke video izvore.
extension.disclaimer: This script only resolves video content from legitimate file lockers without prejudice. If this script is being used by 3rd parties to resolve content that you feel infringes upon your Intellectual Property then please take your complaints to the actual website or developer linking to such content and not here. This script in no way searches for any content whatsoever.

ОӨОҝ ОұОҪПүП„ОӯПҒОҝ ПғОөОҪО¬ПҒО№Оҝ П„Оҝ ОјПҢОҪОҝ ПҖОҝП… ОәО¬ОҪОөО№ ОөОҜОҪОұО№ ОҪОұ ОөПҖО№О»ПҚОөО№ ОҝПҖП„О№ОәОҝОұОәОҝП…ПғП„О№ОәПҢ ПҖОөПҒО№ОөПҮПҢОјОөОҪОҝ ОұПҖПҢ ОҪПҢОјО№ОјОөПӮ ПҖО·ОіОӯПӮ ПҮПүПҒОҜПӮ ПҖПҒОҝОәОұП„О¬О»О·ПҲО·. extension.disclaimer: Users need to provide OpenSubtitles.com username and password in add-on configuration. This is our new extension, old opensubtitles.org will not work on this, but the account can be easily imported on opensubtitles.com.
extension.news:
v1.0.8 (2025-10-07) - performs a query to kodi library if imdb or tmdb ID is missing (thanks you cvanderkam)
v1.0.7 (2025-08-26) - added IMDB and TMDB collection on files for more accurate search to the API
v1.0.6 (2024-11-29) - fixed issue with RAR archives (thanks ninjacarr) - handles default chinese language to zh-cn (thanks ninjacarr)
v1.0.5 (2024-07-30) - fixed issue with portuguese file names - added AI translated filter (thanks Kate6)
v1.0.4 (2024-01-15) - Sanitize language query - Improved sorting - Improved error messages - Improved usage of moviehash
v1.0.3 (2023-12-18) - Fixed issue with file path
v1.0.2 (2023-08-28) - Update user agent header
v1.0.1 (2023-07-28) - Remove limit of 10 subtitles for the returned values - Fix Portuguese and Brazilian flags

extension.description: [B][COLOR FF009900]Starts TorrServer automatically at boot. Configurable from Kodi settings. Supports Windows, Linux, CoreELEC/LibreELEC and Android (with improved hardware detection). On some Android devices, SELinux restrictions may prevent running the binary; in that case, use the TorrServer APK from F-Droid and configure the addon to connect to it.[/COLOR][/B]

[B][COLOR FF009900]Porneste TorrServer automat la boot. Configurabil din setarile Kodi. Suporta Windows, Linux, CoreELEC/LibreELEC si Android (cu detectie hardware imbunatatita). Pe unele dispozitive Android, restrictiile SELinux pot impiedica rularea binarului; in acest caz, folositi aplicatia TorrServer APK de pe F-Droid si configurati addon-ul sa se conecteze la ea.[/COLOR][/B]
